data.title: West Virginia lawmaker introduces bill to allow state crypto investments
data.description:

data.title: US-Taiwan trade deal unlocks $250 billion investment into American chip sector
data.description:
The United States and Taiwan have signed a new trade deal to bring chip manufacturing directly onto American soil, the Commerce Department said on Thursday. As part of the agreement, Taiwanese chip and tech companies will invest at least $250 billion into U. S. production. On top of that, Taiwan’s government will guarantee another $250 billion […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/taiwan-250-billion-investment-into-us-chips/

data.title: Bitcoin Breaks Free From The Current Range — $107,000 Now The Level To Watch
data.description:
Bitcoin is starting to emerge from its consolidation phase, suggesting that a decisive move may be underway. After holding above the former resistance, the market is starting to show early signs of confidence returning. The spotlight now shifts to the $107,000 level, where the strength of this breakout will be truly tested. Holds Firm Despite A Weak Start To The Session Bitcoin Meraklsi, in a recent BTC market update, outlined a largely positive outlook despite the day beginning with some downside pressure
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-breaks-current-range/

data.title: DTCC aiming to make all 1.4 million securities in its custody digitally eligible
data.description:
The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) is currently pursuing an ambitious initiative aimed at transforming its entire portfolio of securities, which encompasses approximately 1.4 million individual financial instruments, to become fully digitally eligible for trading and settlement processes. This move is expected to enhance efficiency, reduce operational risks, and streamline the overall financial transaction ecosystem. By digitizing these securities, DTCC hopes to facilitate easier access for market participants, improve accuracy in record-keeping, and ultimately support the broader adoption of innovative financial technologies across the industry.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/01/15/dtcc-says-it-aims-to-make-all-1-4-million-securities-in-its-custody-digitally-eligible

data.title: Russia to require banks to report on client crypto transactions
data.description:
Russia’s monetary authority intends to oblige commercial banks to provide detailed reports on their customers’ transactions related to cryptocurrency. The policy is part of new reporting requirements that concern all cross-border transfers made by Russians and comes ahead of the full regulation of the crypto market planned for this year. Bank of Russia wants to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-to-require-banks-to-report-on-client-crypto-transactions/

data.title: Retail investors are going crazy for silver
data.description:
In just the last 30 days, retail traders have shoved over $920 million into silver-linked ETFs. That’s the biggest ever. The two big names getting all the action are iShares Silver Trust (SLV) and ProShares Ultra Silver (AGQ). Every single day, more retail cash piles in. SLV has now had 169 straight sessions of inflows. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/retail-investors-are-going-crazy-for-silver/

data.title: Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Take Profits as Price Pushes Higher
data.description:
Short-term Bitcoin holders remain highly reactive to recent price movements, with on-chain data showing a clear tendency to realize profits during the latest rebound. While the move higher can be classified as technical in nature, behavior among newer holders suggests caution rather than renewed conviction.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/short-term-bitcoin-holders-take-profits-as-price-pushes-higher/
